label: Discord Message
description: Send a message to a Discord channel via webhook. Supports plain content, custom username, and embeds.

settings.name: embeds
settings.label: Embeds
settings.description: Optional Discord embed objects array — passed through to the webhook payload as-is.

ai.shortDescription: Post a message to Discord via webhook.
ai.whenToUse: When you need to notify a Discord channel about a workflow event or status update.
ai.examplePrompt: post to the Discord build channel when a deploy finishes
ai.promptHints: Reference output via {{steps.<id>.result.sent}} (boolean). Discord returns 204 No Content on success.

outputAssertions.name: sent_ok
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Discord webhook responded with non-success status.
